query: SELECT id, userId, frequencyName, arcType, isDefault, createdAt, JSON_TYPE(vocabularyJson) as vocabType, JSON_KEYS(vocabularyJson) as vocabKeys FROM creator_frequencies WHERE userId = 5940001 ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
